items.title: Franklin Mutual Beacon Fund Q1 2025 Commentary
items.description: Franklin Mutual Beacon Fund (Class Z) outperformed its benchmark, the MSCI World Value Index, for the quarter ended March 31, 2025. Read more here.

items.title: Oil Tumbles as Trump’s Trade War Pummels Outlook for Demand
items.description: (Bloomberg) -- Oil dropped as the global trade war hurts the outlook for demand, with data indicating signs of strain in the US economy. items.title: Is JPMorgan Large Cap Value Fund A (OLVAX) a Strong Mutual Fund Pick Right Now?
Insider Trader Gets Jail as SEC Reviews Tool That Caught Him

items.title: US Boosts Net Quarterly Borrowing Estimate to $514 Billion
items.description: (Bloomberg) -- The US Treasury ramped up its estimate for federal borrowing for the current quarter to account for a much smaller starting stockpile of cash than it had projected — a consequence of Congress having failed as yet to raise the federal debt limit.Most Read from BloombergNew York City Transit System Chips Away at Subway Fare EvasionNYC’s Congestion Toll Raised $159 Million in the First QuarterNewsom Says California Is Now the World’s Fourth-Biggest EconomyAt Bryn Mawr, a Monumental P

items.title: JPMorgan Hires CDH Investments Chief to Strengthen Asia Pacific Push
items.description: JPMorgan has appointed the chief executive of Chinese alternative asset manager CDH Investments as its new vice chair of Asia Pacific, marking the latest major hire by the U.S. bank as it seeks to expand its business in the region.
